name: drawer
label: Drawer
description: A teleported slide-in panel from the left or right, with header, content and footer slots and optional parent scaling.

props.name: position
props.description: Which side the drawer slides in from.

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the drawer is open on load.

props.name: parent
props.description: Optional CSS selector of an element to subtly scale/dim while the drawer is open.

props.name: zIndex
props.description: The stacking z-index for the overlay.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The element that opens the drawer (default slot).
